usage.label: Usage {{used}} / {{limit}}
monitoring.title: Competitor price monitoring
monitoring.subtitle: Track your prices against competitors and spot risk early.
monitoring.error_body: Check your connection and retry shortly.
monitoring.empty_body: Try clearing search or changing the status filter.
pricing.title: Dynamic price optimization
pricing.subtitle: Tune strategy and preview impact before you publish changes.
pricing.form_description: Adjust how aggressively you want to price versus the market.
pricing.preview_hint: Updates instantly as you move the slider.
pricing.preview_footnote: Illustrative numbers for the selected SKU sample; connect data sources for live forecasts.
pricing.confirm_body: This will queue a marketplace update for the selected offer.
placeholder.seo_body: Structured titles, attributes, and keyword suggestions will land here.
placeholder.returns_body: Track return reasons and automate dispute-ready evidence.
placeholder.niche_body: Demand curves, saturation, and margin bands for new categories.
tools.premium_gate: Upgrade to the paid plan to run live AI requests and unlock the full comparison view.
tools.quota_exhausted_gate: Daily AI quota exhausted for your current plan. Upgrade to continue right away.
tools.token_estimate_only: Estimated tokens ~{{tokens}} (usage not returned by provider)
tools.token_usage_empty: Run a generation to see usage.
tools.seo_subtitle: Draft marketplace titles, descriptions, and keywords with AI, then compare against your current copy.
tools.seo_input_desc: Pick a catalog item or edit fields manually before generating.
tools.seo_free_hint: Generation requires a paid plan. You can still edit originals on the left.
tools.seo_compare_desc: Original versus model output side by side.
tools.seo_generated_placeholder: Run generation to fill this column.
tools.seo_parse_error: Model returned text we could not parse as JSON. Try again or shorten inputs.
tools.seo_saved_local: Saved generated copy into the original fields (local session only).
tools.seo_ai_instruction: Respond with JSON only (no markdown) in this shape: {"title":"...","description":"...","keywords":["...","..."]}. Use the seller language. Keep keywords 5–12 items.
tools.returns_subtitle: Visualize return-risk trends, scan category-week heat, and review high-risk SKUs with suggested fixes.
tools.returns_chart_desc: Illustrative series per selected product; drag the brush to zoom a window.
tools.returns_heatmap_desc: Darker cells indicate higher modeled risk intensity for the sample catalog.
tools.returns_free_hint: AI narrative refresh is available on the paid plan. Table below uses sample heuristics.
tools.returns_ai_prompt: Return JSON only: {"items":[{"productId":"id","productName":"name","reasons":["..."],"recommendations":["..."]}]} covering each high-risk product below. Be concise.
tools.niche_subtitle: Semantic scan plus positioning chart: volume signals, price hints, and gap bullets from retrieved listings.
tools.niche_query_desc: Describe a category or buyer search phrase.
tools.niche_free_hint: Running vector + LLM analysis requires a paid plan.
tools.niche_metric_volume_hint: Count of similar vectors returned for your account index.
tools.niche_metric_price_hint: Parsed from snippet text when prices are mentioned.
tools.niche_gap_desc: Lines that look like missing features or weaknesses versus top performers.
tools.niche_gap_empty: No structured gaps detected; see the narrative summary below.
tools.niche_scatter_desc: Illustrative scatter: price vs. rating (seeded demo points; combine with your live retrieval over time).
